title: contrib/rpm/buildah_copr.spec
body:
Tom and I decided we would not edit the original RPM spec
for copr builds and would instead provide a second one.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: The changes LGTM, tests aren't happy due to unrelated issues.  Gonna try to retest.  @nalind WDYT?
There should be only one spec.  We should drop the old one, if this one is going to be used regularly.  Anyone who wishes to build a package off of the spec should be able to use this one.
removed the "other" spec file and left just the copr one, renamed it to buildah.spec
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably e623e5c) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
